explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A court filing highlights governance through the mention of AI/ML decisions. This document also references vendor choices, implying policy considerations for governance.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This court filing provides evidence for the **governance** and **oversight** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights governance through the mention of AI/ML decisions and vendor choices, implying policy considerations. Furthermore, the document supports oversight by explicitly stating the requirement for continuous oversight of AI use and referencing AI-driven segmentation as a measure against threats, indicating policy and procedural considerations.
relevant_sources.title: Community Health Systems Faces Lawsuit Over Breach

oversight.findings: A court filing states the requirement for continuous oversight of AI use. This document also references AI-driven segmentation as a measure against threats, indicating policy and procedural considerations for oversight.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This court filing provides evidence for the **governance** and **oversight** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights governance through the mention of AI/ML decisions and vendor choices, implying policy considerations. Furthermore, the document supports oversight by explicitly stating the requirement for continuous oversight of AI use and referencing AI-driven segmentation as a measure against threats, indicating policy and procedural considerations.
relevant_sources.title: Community Health Systems Faces Lawsuit Over Breach

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 12 publicly available sources, Community Health Systems' published materials address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars: oversight and governance. Documentation for oversight includes a court filing stating the requirement for continuous oversight of AI use and referencing AI-driven segmentation as a measure against threats; governance materials highlight AI/ML decisions and vendor choices. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
